roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT RAMY YASSINE APPEARING/3000ADM/X: ADMITS VIOLATION #1/3000REIN/PAJ: 90 DAYS/CTORD:THERE IS NO TIME LOST ON PAROLE DUE TO THE ADMISSION OF THIS VIOLATION/X: PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 10 DAYS,/4019HALF/X: REMAINDER OF VIOLATIONS ARE DISMISSED/  /X: PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/
